pi_items.source: Synthetic test data - not verifiable against real sources

pi_items.verified_value: 123.450 MHz is a valid aviation frequency
pi_items.source: FCC regulations and ICAO standards confirm 123.450 MHz is designated for flight test operations in the U.S. and for air-to-air communications in oceanic airspace internationally

pi_items.verified_value: C:\Users\Public\Documents\CAMEO Data (directory). Modern CAMEO Data Manager uses .zip files for backups, not .mer files
pi_items.source: Official search results indicate correct path is 'C:\Users\Public\Documents\CAMEO Data'. .mer files are legacy format from CAMEOfm, not modern CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1. Current version exports data as .zip files

pi_items.metadata_value: Implied CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1 (from installer URL and task setup)
pi_items.source: EPA official website (https://www.epa.gov/cameo/cameo-data-manager-software) and GovDelivery announcement confirm version 4.5.0 was released in December 2025. Windows installer URL matches: cameodatamanager451installer.exe

pi_items.verified_value: EPCRA Tier II data uses XML format per EPA/NOAA national data standard v1.0
pi_items.source: National Tier II Data Standard (https://cameo.noaa.gov/epcra_tier2/data_standard/v1/) - XML format adopted by EPA and NOAA for chemical inventory reporting

pi_items.verified_value: No online presence or verifiable real-world location
pi_items.source: Web search returned no results for this address, indicating it is synthetic/fictional

pi_items.verified_value: 555 exchange numbers are not assigned by the FCC and are reserved for fictional/example use
pi_items.source: Phone number uses 555 prefix which is traditionally reserved as placeholder/example numbers in the U.S. and are not licensed for actual use

privileged_info_summary: CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1 is a real EPA software released in December 2025 for emergency response planning. The task requires adding a helicopter landing zone record with notes containing the valid aviation frequency 123.450 MHz (FCC-designated for flight test operations). EPCRA Tier II data referenced in scripts follows EPA/NOAA's XML data standard for chemical inventory reporting. The task uses synthetic contact data including a fictional address (8500 Ballpark Road, Centerville, CA 90210) and phone number with 555 exchange (reserved for examples). The database path claimed in metadata (C:\Users\Public\Documents\CAMEO Data Manager\CAMEO.mer) contradicts official documentation which indicates the correct path is C:\Users\Public\Documents\CAMEO Data and modern CAMEO Data Manager uses .zip format for backups, not legacy .mer files.
